name: Vera Maari Trip
overview: In Vera Maari Trip, the ASS interns, now full-time employees, decide to go on a road trip inspired by an influencer’s travel vlog. The group encounters unexpected challenges, meets intriguing strangers, and navigates an unpredictable journey. Adding to the tension is a looming deadline to submit a crucial proposal for their company’s new merger. Will they manage to complete the trip?

trailers.title: Vera Maari Trip - Official Trailer | an aha original series | THU-SAT 7 PM | Kanaa productions
